NOTICE OF UNAVAILABILITY OF YIU, KAREN W ON SEP-29-2011 THROUGH OCT-10-2011 FILED BY DEFENDANT COMMISSIONER OF THE CALIFORNIA DEPARTMENT OF INSURANCE

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT COMMISSIONER OF THE CALIFORNIA DEPARTMENT OF INSURANCE'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED WITH 30 DAYS LEAVE TO ANSWER. PLAINTIFF ALLEGES THE COMMISSIONER FAILED TO PERFORM THE MANDATORY DUTIES IMPOSED ON HIM TO REQUIRE COMPLIANCE WITH THE INSURANCE CODE. (PARAGRAPHS 62-63.) THE COMMISSIONER MUST REVIEW ANY INSURANCE POLICY SUBMITTED FOR APPROVAL IN CALIFORNIA AND MAKE A FINDING THAT THE POLICY COMPLIES WITH THE CALIFORNIA INSURANCE CODE. (SEE INS. CODE SECTION 10291.5.) THE COMPLAINT ALLEGES HE FAILED TO PERFORM THE DUTIES IMPOSED UPON HIM. THE COMPLAINT STATES A CAUSE OF ACTION FOR MANDAMUS. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER.) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES ; REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE FILED BY DEFENDANT NORTHWESTERN MUTUAL LIFE INSURANCE COMPANY HEARING SET FOR SEP-20-2011 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT THE NORTHWESTERN MUTUAL LIFE INSURANCE COMPANY'S DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT. ARGUED AND THE COURT TOOK THE MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION AS TO THE FRAUD ALLEGATION ONLY AND ADOPTED THE REMAINDER OF ITS TENTATIVE RULING. -- AFTER HEARING, THE COURT RULED AS FOLLOWS: COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FINAL - DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER IS OVERRULED. THE REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE IS GRANTED. HOWEVER, PLAINTIFF HAS SUFFICIENTLY PLEAD HIS CAUSE OF ACTION FOR FRAUD AND DEFENDANT'S REMAINING GROUNDS ON DEMURRER ARE MORE APPROPRIATELY DETERMINED ON A MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. BASED ON THE ABOVE THE DEMURRER ON THE PUNITIVE DAMAGES CLAIM IS OVERRULED AS WELL. DEFENDANT TO PREPARE A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: LORETTA M. GIORGI, REPORTER: KARLA ELLIS-DAVIS, CSR #12998

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF DEC-16-2011 CONTINUED TO JAN-27-2012 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610 TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S) COMMISSIONER OF THE CALIFORNIA DEPARTMENT OF INSURANCE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR OBJECTION HEARING HEARING SET FOR MAR-29-2012 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 610
REMOVED FROM SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR SET FOR FEB-27-2013 - CASE SETTLED PRIOR TO CONFERENCE.
REMOVED FROM MASTER JURY CALENDAR SET FOR MAR-25-2013 - CASE SETTLED. ASSIGNED TO DEPT. 610 ON MAY-14-2013 AT 10:30 AM FOR DISMISSAL PER CRC 3.1385.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-28-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANT COMMISSIONER OF THE CALIFORNIA DEPARTMENT OF INSURANCE'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT.

APPEARANCES: Karen W. Yiu, Deputy Atty General 703-5385 for defendant & moving party (gave notice); no other appearances.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as modified - OVERRULED, 30 DAYS LEAVE TO ANSWER. PLAINTIFF ALLEGES THE COMMISSIONER FAILED TO PERFORM THE MANDATORY DUTIES IMPOSED ON HIM TO REQUIRE COMPLIANCE WITH THE INSURANCE CODE. (PARAGRAPHS 62-63.) THE COMMISSIONER MUST REVIEW ANY INSURANCE POLICY SUBMITTED FOR APPROVAL IN CALIFORNIA AND MAKE A FINDING THAT THE POLICY COMPLIES WITH THE CALIFORNIA INSURANCE CODE. (SEE INS. CODE SECTION 10291.5.) THE COMPLAINT ALLEGES HE FAILED TO PERFORM THE DUTIES IMPOSED UPON HIM. THE COMPLAINT STATES A CAUSE OF ACTION FOR MANDAMUS. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER.) (302/CWW) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-20-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANT THE NORTHWESTERN MUTUAL LIFE INSURANCE COMPANY'S DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT.

APPEARANCES: Lawrence Mann, Esq. of Bourhis & Mann 392-4660 for pltf & opposing party; Francis J. Torrence, Esq. of Wilson Elser Moskowitz Edelman & Dicker LLP 625-9325 for deft & moving party.

RULING: Argued and the Court took the matter under submission as to the fraud allegation only and adopted the remainder of its tentative ruling.
After hearing, the Court ruled as follows: Court adopts its tentative ruling as final - DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER IS OVERRULED. THE REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE IS GRANTED. HOWEVER, PLAINTIFF HAS SUFFICIENTLY PLEAD HIS CAUSE OF ACTION FOR FRAUD AND DEFENDANT'S REMAINING GROUNDS ON DEMURRER ARE MORE APPROPRIATELY DETERMINED ON A MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. BASED ON THE ABOVE THE DEMURRER ON THE PUNITIVE DAMAGES CLAIM IS OVERRULED AS WELL. Defendant to prepare a proposed form of order. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998
